name: What is he doing? (Webhook Logger)
description: Sends optional notifications based on your actions to a Discord webhook you configure.

webhook-url.name: Webhook URL
webhook-url.description: HTTPS Discord webhook URL. Leave empty to disable all outbound messages.

webhook-username.name: Webhook Display Name
webhook-username.description: The webhook's display name. Leave empty to use the default.

test-webhook.name: Send Test Webhook
test-webhook.description: Enable and apply to send a test message (then resets).

max-retries.name: Max Webhook Retries
max-retries.description: How many times to retry sending after a failed attempt.

blocking-webhook.name: Blocking request on exit (READ DESCRIPTION)
blocking-webhook.description: YOU DON'T NEED THIS UNLESS YOU'RE HAVING ISSUES WITH IT NOT SENDING ON EXIT. If enabled, the "Closed Geometry Dash" message uses a blocking request so it is more likely to finish before the process ends. Can freeze the game for up to several tens of seconds in worst case. Not used for any other notification.

player-name.name: Player Name
player-name.description: Name shown in each message. Empty uses "He".

notify-game-session.name: Notify on Opening/Exiting Geometry Dash
notify-game-session.description: Log when the game is opened and closed. Exit time is included in the close message if enabled.

notify-play-level.name: Notify on Playing/Exiting a Level
notify-play-level.description: Log when a level is started and when the run is exited, including time in the level.

notify-level-complete.name: Notify on Level Complete
notify-level-complete.description: Log when a run completes and include time on that run.

notify-new-best.name: Notify on New Best
notify-new-best.description: Log when you achieve a new best on a level.

notify-editor.name: Notify on Opening/Exiting the Editor
notify-editor.description: Log when the editor is opened and when you leave the editor (save and play, save and exit, exit without save).

notify-death.name: Notify on Death
notify-death.description: Log when you die in a level. Only sent in normal mode (not practice or startpos), only above the minimum percent below, and never when the death is itself a new best (the New Best message covers that case).

death-min-percent.name: Minimum Death Percent
death-min-percent.description: Skip death notifications below this percent. Set to 0 to send every death.

level-filter-mode.name: Level ID Filter Mode
level-filter-mode.description: All = send normally. Blacklist = redact identifying info (level name, creator, ID) for IDs in the list. Whitelist = redact for IDs NOT in the list.

level-filter-ids.name: Level IDs (comma-separated)
level-filter-ids.description: Use the toggle button on the level info page to add/remove levels. Or do it the old way by making a list in a note app and copy pasting it here. It will automatically filter out text for you too (e.g. "1 Stereo Madness, 2 Back On Track" -> "1, 2").

suppress-redacted.name: Don't Send Redacted Messages
suppress-redacted.description: When on, any level message that would otherwise be sent as "Private level" (because of the filter mode above) is dropped entirely instead of sent. Use this for full privacy on filtered levels. Affects level start, exit, complete, death, new best, and editor open/exit.
